description: In Swift, when Package.swift / Package.resolved and the resolved version graph change, verify the lockfile, generated artifacts, and a runtime smoke.
body: In Swift, a dependency change ripples through Package.swift / Package.resolved and the resolved version graph, generated bindings, and runtime behavior, so it needs more than a recompile. Use when Package.swift / Package.resolved and the resolved version graph are added, removed, or version-bumped. Do not merge a dependency bump on a green compile alone, and avoid editing the lockfile by hand. Actions: inspect the dependency delta, re-resolve and review Package.swift / Package.resolved and the resolved version graph, regenerate affected Swift Package plugin output and generated bindings (e.g. from .proto), then run swift test (XCTest/swift-testing) on the affected target and smoke the import/runtime path. Validation signals include a reviewed lockfile diff, a clean swift build -warnings-as-errors and the Xcode static analyzer pass, and a passing runtime smoke. Risk boundary: escalate on a major-version bump, a transitive conflict you cannot resolve, or a license/security flag.
